Controls.PlayerRoll: Ten Candles: roll the player pool
Controls.GMRoll: Ten Candles: roll the GM pool

Chat.Title: Ten Candles — Resolution
Chat.GMWaiting: The GM must click the Ten Candles button.

Settings.StateHint: Persistent state used by the module.

Notifications.GMOnly: This action is restricted to the GM.
Notifications.ActiveResolution: A Ten Candles resolution is already active.
Notifications.BallOfTruths: The game is currently in the Ball of Truths.
Notifications.NoBlueDice: No blue dice are currently available.
Notifications.NoPendingResolution: No player resolution is waiting for the GM roll.
Notifications.GMAlreadyRolled: The red pool has already been rolled for this resolution.
Notifications.NoActiveGM: No active GM is available to process the Ten Candles roll.
Notifications.RollError: An error occurred during the Ten Candles roll.
Notifications.StateReset: The Ten Candles state has been reset.
